title: Rab-Mag #7248
definition:
1) soothsayer, magician, chief soothsayer
    1a) Rab-mag, chief soothsayer, or chief of princes, an official
        of  Babylonia
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) soothsayer, magician, chief soothsayer
    1a) Rab-mag, chief soothsayer, or chief of princes, an official
        of  Babylonia

    NASB:  perh. chief soothsayer, an official of the Bab. king
